expression.expression:
SUM(CASE
  WHEN is_refunded
    THEN 1
  ELSE 0
END)

CASE
  WHEN total_orders > 0
    THEN (orders_with_crosssell * 1.0) / total_orders
  ELSE 0.0
END

CASE
  WHEN total_order_value > 0
    THEN total_crosssell_value / total_order_value
  ELSE 0.0
END

LEAST(
  100.0, 
  (
    1.0
    - CASE
        WHEN total_orders > 0
          THEN (orders_with_crosssell * 1.0) / total_orders
        ELSE 0.0
      END
  )
  * 50.0
  + (LEAST(CAST(total_orders AS DOUBLE), 500.0) / 500.0 * 50.0))

CASE
  WHEN items_sold > 0
    THEN (refunded_items * 1.0) / items_sold
  ELSE 0.0
END

CASE
  WHEN total_gross_revenue > 0
    THEN total_refund_amount / total_gross_revenue
  ELSE 0.0
END

LEAST(
  100.0, 
  (
    CASE
      WHEN items_sold > 0
        THEN (refunded_items * 1.0) / items_sold
      ELSE 0.0
    END
  )
  * 80.0
  + (LEAST(CAST(refunded_items AS DOUBLE), 50.0) / 50.0 * 20.0))

CAST(CASE
  WHEN crosssell_rate < 0.1 AND total_orders > 50
    THEN 'Implement product bundling or recommendations'
  WHEN crosssell_rate < 0.2 AND total_orders > 100
    THEN 'Improve product page cross-sell visibility'
  WHEN crosssell_value_share < 0.05 AND orders_with_crosssell > 10
    THEN 'Promote higher-value cross-sell items'
  ELSE NULL
END AS STRING)

CAST(CASE
  WHEN items_sold > 0
    THEN (refunded_items * 1.0) / items_sold
  ELSE 0.0
END AS DOUBLE)

CAST(CASE
  WHEN items_sold > 0
    THEN total_net_revenue / items_sold
  ELSE 0.0
END AS DOUBLE)

CASE
  WHEN days_since_launch <= 7
    THEN 'week_1'
  WHEN days_since_launch <= 14
    THEN 'week_2'
  WHEN days_since_launch <= 30
    THEN 'month_1'
  WHEN days_since_launch <= 60
    THEN 'month_2'
  ELSE 'month_3'
END

SUM(CASE
  WHEN is_refunded
    THEN 1
  ELSE 0
END)

CASE
  WHEN days_since_launch <= 7
    THEN 'week_1'
  WHEN days_since_launch <= 14
    THEN 'week_2'
  WHEN days_since_launch <= 30
    THEN 'month_1'
  WHEN days_since_launch <= 60
    THEN 'month_2'
  ELSE 'month_3'
END

CASE
  WHEN o.items_purchased > 1
    THEN 1
  ELSE 0
END

CAST(CASE
  WHEN items_sold > 0
    THEN (refunded_items * 1.0) / items_sold
  ELSE 0.0
END AS DOUBLE)

CAST(CASE
  WHEN total_gross_revenue > 0
    THEN total_gross_margin / total_gross_revenue
  ELSE 0.0
END AS DOUBLE)

SUM(CASE
  WHEN is_primary_item = 1
    THEN 1
  ELSE 0
END)

SUM(CASE
  WHEN is_primary_item = 0
    THEN 1
  ELSE 0
END)

SUM(CASE
  WHEN is_refunded
    THEN 1
  ELSE 0
END)

CAST(CASE
  WHEN launch_refund_rate > 0.1 AND launch_items_sold > 10
    THEN 'Investigate early quality or expectation issues'
  WHEN launch_items_sold < 20 AND DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE(), analysis_date) > 30
    THEN 'Review launch marketing effectiveness'
  WHEN net_revenue_per_item < 30.0 AND launch_items_sold > 50
    THEN 'Evaluate launch pricing strategy'
  ELSE NULL
END AS STRING)

CAST(CASE
  WHEN items_sold > 0
    THEN (refunded_items * 1.0) / items_sold
  ELSE 0.0
END AS DOUBLE)

CAST(CASE
  WHEN total_gross_revenue > 0
    THEN total_refund_amount / total_gross_revenue
  ELSE 0.0
END AS DOUBLE)

CASE
  WHEN o.items_purchased > 1
    THEN 1
  ELSE 0
END

SUM(CASE
  WHEN is_refunded
    THEN 1
  ELSE 0
END)

CAST(CASE
  WHEN refund_rate > 0.15 AND items_sold > 20
    THEN 'Investigate product quality issues'
  WHEN refund_rate > 0.1 AND items_sold > 50
    THEN 'Review product description accuracy'
  WHEN refund_value_rate > 0.1 AND total_gross_revenue > 1000
    THEN 'Analyze refund request patterns'
  ELSE NULL
END AS STRING)

SUM(CASE
  WHEN is_refunded
    THEN 1
  ELSE 0
END)

CASE
  WHEN launch_items_sold > 0
    THEN (launch_refunded_items * 1.0) / launch_items_sold
  ELSE 0.0
END

CASE
  WHEN launch_items_sold > 0
    THEN launch_net_revenue / launch_items_sold
  ELSE 0.0
END

LEAST(
  100.0, 
  (
    CASE
      WHEN launch_items_sold > 0
        THEN (launch_refunded_items * 1.0) / launch_items_sold
      ELSE 0.0
    END
  )
  * 50.0
  + (100.0 - LEAST(CAST(launch_items_sold AS DOUBLE), 100.0)) * 0.5)
